mapper.insert: INSERT INTO child_grow_history (ch_seq, height, weight, reg_id, reg_date, delete_yn) VALUES (#{chSeq}, #{height}, #{weight}, #{regId, typeHandler=com.childcare.global.config.UuidTypeHandler}::uuid, NOW(), 'N')
mapper.update: UPDATE child_grow_history SET delete_yn = 'Y', delete_id = #{deleteId, typeHandler=com.childcare.global.config.UuidTypeHandler}::uuid, delete_date = NOW() WHERE ch_seq = #{childId} AND gh_seq = #{historyId} AND (delete_yn IS NULL OR delete_yn != 'Y')
